plugins.name: emdash-guard
plugins.description: Post-write hook: flags em dashes and stand-in dashes in files Claude writes, so Claude fixes them before moving on.

plugins.name: commit-guard
plugins.description: Blocks git commits carrying a Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer, at the Claude tool layer, with a git commit-msg backstop you can install per repo.

plugins.name: commit-style
plugins.description: Guide, not a guard: warns (never blocks) when a commit subject is not Conventional Commits format. Installed as a per-repo commit-msg hook.

plugins.name: session-logger
plugins.description: Appends a per-day markdown log of each session: start, file writes, bash commands, and stop. Never blocks.

plugins.name: plugin-vet
plugins.description: Security-review a plugin before installing it: /plugin-vet:vet runs a deterministic malware scan of its hooks and scripts, then an AI review, with a BLOCK / WARN / CLEAN verdict.
